Foundation Courses

WGSS301

Introduction to Research in Gender, Race, and

Queer Studies

WGSS487

Advanced Research Seminar in Gender, Race, and

Queer Studies

Upper Level Requirements

9 of the 18 credits are required to be ULC, 6 are required to be ULE, the remaining 3 credits can come from either the ULC or ULE lists
